residue.config.title: Residue
residue.config.enable_mod.desc: Completely enables or disables all Residue systems.
residue.config.debug.desc: Prints internal state (memory, observer, events) to the server log.
residue.config.language.desc: The language observers will use for both text (LLM) and voice (TTS).
residue.config.twitch_enable.desc: Allows the observer system to pull names from a Twitch chat instead of (or alongside) the static database.
residue.config.twitch_channel.desc: The Twitch channel name to read active chat participants from.
residue.config.voicechat_enable.desc: Allows Simple Voice Chat activity (speaking, silence) to influence Memory growth and event probability.
residue.config.voice_attention_multiplie: Scales how much voice activity contributes to attention/memory growth.
residue.config.max_memory.desc: The upper limit of memory. Event stages are calculated as percentages of this value.
residue.config.memory_seconds.desc: How often (in seconds) memory increases by one step. Lower values make the world deteriorate faster.
residue.config.clone.desc: Enables the self-clone — a distant copy of the player that disappears before it can be reached.
residue.config.clone.min_distance.desc: Minimum distance (in blocks) at which the clone can appear.
residue.config.clone.max_distance.desc: Maximum distance (in blocks) at which the clone can appear.
residue.config.clone.cooldown.desc: Minimum time (in seconds) between two clone appearances.
residue.config.dream.desc: Enables the dream sequence — after sleeping, a segment of gameplay may turn out to have been a dream.
residue.config.fake_lan.desc: Simulates opening the world to LAN — shows a system message and disables the Open to LAN button.
residue.config.fake_lan.min_minutes.desc: Minimum time in minutes before the Fake LAN event triggers.
residue.config.fake_lan.max_minutes.desc: Maximum time in minutes before the Fake LAN event triggers.
residue.config.torch.desc: Enables distant torches that appear in the direction the player is looking and vanish when approached.
residue.config.torch.min_distance.desc: Minimum distance (in blocks) at which a torch can appear.
residue.config.torch.max_distance.desc: Maximum distance (in blocks) at which a torch can appear.
How close (in blocks) the player must get before the torch vanishes.
residue.config.torch.despawn_seconds.des: How many seconds the torch stays in the world if the player does not approach it.
residue.config.torch.max_active.desc: Maximum number of torches that can exist in the world at the same time.
residue.config.torch.spawn_chance.desc: Spawn probability per tick (value / 100000). Default 5 = 0.00005 per tick (~once every 3 minutes).
residue.config.torch.memory_min.desc: Minimum memory percentage at which torches can appear.
residue.config.torch.memory_max.desc: Maximum memory percentage at which torches can appear.
residue.config.observer.connect_chance_n: Chance of an observer connecting when Fake LAN is not active (value / 100000 per 5 seconds).
residue.config.observer.connect_chance_l: Chance of an observer connecting when Fake LAN is active (value / 1000 per 5 seconds).
residue.config.observer.flap_chance.desc: Percentage chance that a connecting observer will flap (connect/disconnect several times before staying).
residue.config.observer.session_min.desc: Minimum time (in seconds) an observer stays connected.
residue.config.observer.session_max.desc: Maximum time (in seconds) an observer stays connected.
residue.config.observer.max_simultaneous: Maximum number of observers that can be connected at the same time.
residue.config.observer_stage.0.min_spaw: Minimum distance (in blocks) at which the observer entity can spawn relative to the player.
residue.config.observer_stage.0.max_spaw: Maximum distance (in blocks) at which the observer entity can spawn relative to the player.
residue.config.observer_stage.0.watch_di: Distance at which the observer freezes and stares at the player, only while the player can see it (line of sight, no obstructions). Losing sight while in this zone teleports the observer away. Set to 0 to disable this behavior for this stage.
residue.config.observer_stage.0.critical: Distance at which the observer teleports away immediately, regardless of whether the player can see it. Set to 0 to disable this behavior for this stage.
residue.config.observer_stage.1.min_spaw: Minimum distance (in blocks) at which the observer entity can spawn relative to the player.
residue.config.observer_stage.1.max_spaw: Maximum distance (in blocks) at which the observer entity can spawn relative to the player.
residue.config.observer_stage.1.watch_di: Distance at which the observer freezes and stares at the player, only while the player can see it (line of sight, no obstructions). Losing sight while in this zone teleports the observer away. Set to 0 to disable this behavior for this stage.
residue.config.observer_stage.1.critical: Distance at which the observer teleports away immediately, regardless of whether the player can see it. Set to 0 to disable this behavior for this stage.
residue.config.observer_stage.2.min_spaw: Minimum distance (in blocks) at which the observer entity can spawn relative to the player.
residue.config.observer_stage.2.max_spaw: Maximum distance (in blocks) at which the observer entity can spawn relative to the player.
residue.config.observer_stage.2.watch_di: Distance at which the observer freezes and stares at the player, only while the player can see it (line of sight, no obstructions). Losing sight while in this zone teleports the observer away. Set to 0 to disable this behavior for this stage.
residue.config.observer_stage.2.critical: Distance at which the observer teleports away immediately, regardless of whether the player can see it. Set to 0 to disable this behavior for this stage.
residue.config.observer_stage.3.min_spaw: Minimum distance (in blocks) at which the observer entity can spawn relative to the player.
residue.config.observer_stage.3.max_spaw: Maximum distance (in blocks) at which the observer entity can spawn relative to the player.
residue.config.observer_stage.3.watch_di: Distance at which the observer freezes and stares at the player, only while the player can see it (line of sight, no obstructions). Losing sight while in this zone teleports the observer away. Set to 0 to disable this behavior for this stage.
residue.config.observer_stage.3.critical: Distance at which the observer teleports away immediately, regardless of whether the player can see it. Set to 0 to disable this behavior for this stage.
residue.config.observer_stage.4.min_spaw: Minimum distance (in blocks) at which the observer entity can spawn relative to the player.
residue.config.observer_stage.4.max_spaw: Maximum distance (in blocks) at which the observer entity can spawn relative to the player.
residue.config.observer_stage.4.watch_di: Distance at which the observer freezes and stares at the player, only while the player can see it (line of sight, no obstructions). Losing sight while in this zone teleports the observer away. Set to 0 to disable this behavior for this stage.
residue.config.observer_stage.4.critical: Distance at which the observer teleports away immediately, regardless of whether the player can see it. Set to 0 to disable this behavior for this stage.
residue.config.observer_raycast_angle.de: Half-angle (in degrees) of the observer's field of view used for the 'watch' visibility check. Lower = narrower tunnel vision, higher = wider peripheral vision.
residue.config.observer_raycast_ignore.d: Blocks that do not block the observer's line-of-sight check. Use 'minecraft:glass' for a specific block, or '#minecraft:glass' for a tag (all blocks with that tag).
residue.config.hf_token.desc:
If downloads fail (error 429), get a free token here:
§9https://huggingface.co/settings/tokens§r

Paste it above to remove limits.
residue.config.llm_enable.desc: Enables the local LLM server for observer responses.
residue.config.llm_backend.desc:
Select the llama.cpp version to download.

§eAUTO§r: Automatically selects Vulkan (if GPU detected) or CPU.
§eVULKAN§r: Recommended. Works on AMD, Intel, Nvidia.
§eHIP§r: For AMD only (requires ROCm/HIP SDK).
§eCUDA§r: For Nvidia GPUs only.
§eCPU§r: CPU only (slower, universal).
residue.config.llm_model.desc:
Select the neural network model to download.

§eQwen 2.5 3B§r: Ultra-lightweight. Fastest response, ideal for weak PCs.

§eQwen 2.5 7B§r: The 'Golden Mean'. Best balance of speed and intelligence. Recommended for most users.

§eQwen 2.5 14B§r: Advanced reasoning. Requires 12+ GB RAM. Slower but much smarter.

§eGemma 2 9B§r: Google's model. Very creative and empathetic tone.

§eMistral 7B§r: The classic reliable model. Stable and predictable.

§eCustom§r: Use your own .gguf file. Specify filename in the field below.
residue.config.custom_model_name.desc:
Specify model filename (e.g., my_model.gguf).
File must be in: /residue_ai/models/llm/
residue.config.llm_think.desc: Allows the model to use chain-of-thought reasoning before responding. May improve coherence at the cost of response speed.
residue.config.llm_max_history.desc: Maximum number of messages kept per observer's conversation history before older messages are discarded.
residue.config.llm_download.desc:
Downloads llama.cpp server and neural network model (~2 GB).

§eImportant:§r Select backend first!
residue.config.llm_cancel.desc: Cancels the current server or model download.
residue.config.llm_server_manual.label: — Manual Server Control —
residue.config.llm_server_toggle.desc: Manually starts the AI server if it is stopped, or stops it if it is running. Same as the /residueai toggle chat command.
residue.config.tts.label: — Text-to-Speech (Voice Synthesis) —
residue.config.tts_enable.desc: Enables voice synthesis for observer responses. Observers will speak their replies aloud.
residue.config.tts_tokenizer.desc: Select the tokenizer model (required for all TTS variants).
residue.config.tts_custom_tokenizer_name:
Specify tokenizer filename (e.g., my_tokenizer.gguf).
File must be in: /residue_ai/models/tts/
residue.config.tts_talker.desc:
Select the voice model.

§eCustomVoice§r: Uses built-in speaker presets (best for NPCs/mobs).
§eBase§r: Supports voice cloning from audio references.
§eVoiceDesign§r: Create voices from text descriptions.
residue.config.tts_custom_talker_name.de:
Specify talker filename (e.g., my_talker.gguf).
File must be in: /residue_ai/models/tts/
residue.config.tts_default_speaker.desc: Default speaker preset for CustomVoice models (e.g., alloy, echo, fable, onyx, nova, shimmer).
residue.config.tts_download.desc:
Downloads qwen-tts server, tokenizer, and talker models (~1-3 GB).

§eImportant:§r Download LLM backend first!
residue.config.tts_cancel.desc: Cancels the current TTS server or model download.
residue.config.tts_server_manual.label: — Manual TTS Server Control —
residue.config.tts_server_toggle.desc: Manually starts the TTS server if it is stopped, or stops it if it is running.
residue.config.observer_work.enable.desc: Allows observers to chop trees, dig, or mine nearby blocks while not watching the player.
residue.config.observer_work.radius.desc: How far (in blocks) the observer searches for a tree/dirt/stone block to work on.
residue.config.observer_work.duration.de: How many ticks (20 = 1 second) the observer spends 'working' on a single block before it breaks.
Maximum number of blocks an observer will break in a single work session before stopping.
residue.config.observer_work.chance.desc: Probability per second that an idle, unwatched observer starts a new work session.
residue.config.observer_work.break_block: Whether the observer actually breaks the block and drops it as an item, or just destroys it without dropping anything.
residue.config.observer_work.can_pick_up: Allows the observer to pick up items dropped from the blocks it breaks.
residue.message.files_not_found: §c[Residue] Files not found. Please download components in mod settings first.
residue.error.custom_model_required: Custom model: please specify filename in settings
residue.error.tts_custom_model_required: Custom TTS model: please specify filename in settings
